calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Hillsborough County Public Schools in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for Hillsborough County Public Schools is Monday, August 10, 2026. Students and staff are expected to report on this date to begin the new academic year.

calendarFaqs.q: When is spring break 2026-2027 for Hillsborough County Public Schools?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring break for Hillsborough County Public Schools runs Mar 22, 2027–Mar 26, 2027, 5 days.

yearNumbers.label: No Fall Break
yearNumbers.detail: The Fall Break observed in 2025-2026 (Nov 24-28) is gone; the district returns to a standard Thanksgiving Break structure.

yearNumbers.label: Florida State Fair Day
yearNumbers.detail: A designated no-school day coincides with the Florida State Fair — a Tampa-specific tradition unique to Hillsborough County.

yearNumbers.label: Strawberry Festival Day
yearNumbers.detail: A no-school day tied to the Plant City Strawberry Festival — a Hillsborough-only observance not found in other Florida district calendars.

calendarNotes: Hillsborough County Public Schools begins the 2026–2027 school year on August 10, 2026. Spring Break runs March 22–26, 2027 — the same week as Miami-Dade, Broward, and Palm Beach counties. Most of Florida is on spring break simultaneously that week. The school year ends May 28, 2027. The 196 teacher workdays figure is published directly in the official HCPS district calendar and reflects 180 student instructional days plus 16 additional teacher planning and professional development days.
